tools.name: list_codebases
tools.description: List all indexed codebases with status and file counts

tools.name: index_codebase
tools.description: Index a new codebase for semantic search. Provide either "source" (absolute path) OR "space" (configured space name).

source.description: Absolute path to source directory (alternative to space)

space.description: Space name from config (e.g., "COOLKID-Work") - resolves project path automatically

project.description: Project folder name within space (defaults to codebase name if not specified)

tools.name: search_codebase
tools.description: [PRIMARY SEARCH] Focused search for single codebase. Combines semantic + keyword matching. Use strategy:keyword for exact names (function/class/files), strategy:semantic for concepts. Codebase name supports partial matching.

strategy.description: hybrid=best overall, keyword=fast exact match, semantic=conceptual similarity

tools.name: search_semantic
tools.description: Semantic (AI embedding) search - finds conceptually similar code. Best for: "how is X implemented?", "find code that does Y", pattern discovery. Slower than keyword but understands meaning, not just text. Codebase name supports partial matching.

query.description: Natural language query describing what you are looking for

tools.name: search_keyword
tools.description: [FASTEST] Indexed keyword search - <100ms. Best for: exact function/class/variable names, imports, file paths. Searches paths AND content. Use INSTEAD of grep_codebase for specific identifiers. Codebase name supports partial matching.

query.description: Keywords to search (function names, class names, etc.)

searchContent.description: Search file content (not just paths). Slightly slower but more thorough.

tools.name: grep_codebase
tools.description: Live regex search via ripgrep. ALWAYS CURRENT (searches filesystem). SLOW (1-3s). Use ONLY for: (1) Complex regex patterns, (2) Exact line numbers for editing, (3) Suspected stale index. Prefer search_keyword for exact names. Codebase name supports partial matching.

regex.description: Use regex pattern matching. Set to false for literal string search (faster)

maxMatchesPerFile.description: Max matches per file (-1 for unlimited, 1 for "find files only")

noCache.description: Skip cache and force fresh search

tools.name: search_all_codebases
tools.description: [LAST RESORT] Search ALL codebases at once. SLOW - searches every codebase sequentially. ONLY use when: (1) You don't know which project has the code, (2) Finding patterns across projects. Prefer search_codebase when you know the project. Strategies: hybrid (default), keyword (fastest), semantic (concepts).

query.description: Search query (natural language, keywords, or grep pattern)

strategy.description: hybrid=best overall (default), keyword=fastest, semantic=conceptual, grep=slow regex (avoid unless needed)

limit.description: Total result limit across all codebases

concurrency.description: Number of codebases to search in parallel

tools.name: get_file_tree
tools.description: Get directory tree for a codebase or subdirectory. START HERE to understand project structure. Returns hierarchical file/folder list with file counts. Codebase name supports partial matching.

path.description: Subdirectory path (empty or omit for root)

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: [KEY SCANNING TOOL] Get file structure: functions (with signatures), classes, imports. Returns metadata without full content - perfect for rapid triage. Use after search to evaluate which files to read. Codebase name supports partial matching.

path.description: File path relative to codebase root

tools.name: get_files_info
tools.description: [BULK SCAN] Get structure for multiple files in one call. Returns array of file info objects. Use after search_codebase to scan all results at once before selecting files to read.

paths.description: Array of file paths to scan

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Get full file content with staleness check. Use AFTER get_file_info to read promising files. Codebase name supports partial matching.

tools.name: refresh_codebase
tools.description: Incremental refresh of codebase index

tools.name: remove_codebase
tools.description: Remove a codebase and all its data

tools.name: check_codebase_status
tools.description: Check staleness status of a codebase (stale files, missing files). Codebase name supports partial matching.

tools.name: check_file_stale
tools.description: Check if a specific file is stale (changed since indexing). Codebase name supports partial matching.

path.description: File path relative to codebase root

tools.name: run_maintenance
tools.description: Manually trigger maintenance cycle to refresh stale codebases

codebase.description: Specific codebase to refresh, or omit for all

tools.name: get_maintenance_stats
tools.description: Get maintenance statistics and status

tools.name: analyze_codebase
tools.description: Generate project description using heuristics (fast, no LLM). Identifies key files and patterns. Codebase name supports partial matching.

name.description: Codebase name to analyze (partial match supported)

tools.name: get_codebase_description
tools.description: Get project description (heuristic-based) with staleness check. Codebase name supports partial matching.

tools.name: get_prioritized_files
tools.description: Get files ordered by importance (high/medium/low priority). Codebase name supports partial matching.
